title: Stainless Steel Kitchen Tongs Set of 3-21cm,27cm and 34cm,Stainless Steel and Non-Slip Heat Resistant Handle - Great for Cooking, Salad, Grilling and Barbecue (21cm+27cm+34cm, Black)
features: [100% FOOD GRADE MATERIAL]:WINPOST Kitchen Tongs Built With Stainless Steel, Sturdy, Heat Resistance, Anti-rust, Anti-corrosion, Light Weight, Easy To Handle, Like New Forever.100% BPA And PVC Free Food Grade Silicone Handle, Heat Resistant Up To 480 Degrees F.Let Your Family And Friends Not Bother To Enjoy The Food!
[PACKAGE]:Three Pieces Tongs,Include One 21cm Small Kitchen Tong, One 27cm Medium Kitchen Tong And One 34cm Large Kitchen Tong.

[LOCK DESIGN]:WINPOST Kitchen Tongs Designed With An Intelligent Locking Clip, The Pull Ring Technology Prevents Accidental Opening And Closing Of The Pliers, Allowing For Easy Control During use.Pull The Ring For Lock And Push For Unlock, Super Easy Operation. Hang Them With The Hanging Loop After Use Or Put In The Drawer By Pulling The Ring To Lock It, Space Saving.

[MULTIPLE APPLICATIONS]:Basic Kitchen Utensil, Perfect For Indoor Or Outdoor Use, Great For Daily Kitchen Tasks, Grilling Corn, Flipping Burgers/Fish, Cutting Roast Meat, Or Used As BBQ Turner Or Salad Server And Much More.

[AFTER-SALE SERVICE]:If You Are Not Satisfied With WINPOST kitchen Tongs, Please Feel Free To Contact Us And We Will Try Our Best To Solve Your Problem. Enjoy This Risk Of Buying Absolutely Free. We Provide The Best Service And Best Product For You At Any Time
description: Product Description WINPOST is a professional manufacturer of stainless steel products.
